title: Senior Product Manager
description_text: Own roadmap, prioritization, customer discovery, and delivery coordination for a B2B SaaS workflow product.

title: Program Manager
description_text: Coordinate cross-functional delivery, release planning, dependency management, and executive communication across software teams.

title: Business Analyst
description_text: Gather requirements, support process mapping, and partner with delivery teams on implementation planning.

title: Software Engineer
description_text: Build backend APIs, debug production issues, and deliver hands-on engineering work in Python services.

title: HR Manager
description_text: Own HR operations, performance cycles, and employee relations processes.
